plan_review_notes: Reviewed the expanded task-specific plan. The artifact-cycle interface task now has explicit ownership boundaries, reconstructability requirements, and scope limits. Approving for spec freeze.

plan_review_history.notes: Expanded BRIEF and PLAN from template text into a task-specific spec. Added explicit artifact-cycle acceptance criteria plus hard risks, safety invariants, out-of-scope limits, evidence requirements, and failure/recovery notes so the interface can be reviewed before runtime work begins.
Reviewed the expanded task-specific plan. The artifact-cycle interface task now has explicit ownership boundaries, reconstructability requirements, and scope limits. Approving for spec freeze.

spec_review_notes: Freeze the minimum evolution artifact-cycle interface with explicit reconstructability fields and ownership boundaries. Exclude a universal artifact engine from this task.

normal_cases.name: The minimum artifact kinds and fields support the current evolution slice without requiring a generic engine.

edge_cases.name: Ownership boundaries remain clear between evolution-generated artifacts and Sisyphus authoritative artifacts.

exception_cases.name: The interface does not overclaim runtime persistence for artifacts that are still future work.
